1
Campaigns Must Have A Specific Objective…
• Introduce you to people who have never heard of you before
(awareness)
• Convert prospects into customers (acquisition)
• Sell a higher dollar product or repeat purchase (monetization)
Cold Traffic
• This is the NEW blood of your business—people who have never heard
of you before
• If you have a brand new business, you must start with cold traffic
Goals of Cold Traffic
• Introduction/Indoctrination: introduce your brand and establish
credibility
• Pixelling: ability to follow up
• Segmentation: making your follow-up more relevant
MODULE 2
SUMMARY NOTES

Molly Pittman

2
Module 2 Summary Notes
Warm Traffic
• These are your acquaintances
• Leads that opted into your email list
• People who have visited your website
• Facebook fans, YouTube subscribers, etc.
• Facebook video viewers, Facebook engagers, Instagram engagers, etc.
Goals of Warm Traffic
• Convert prospects into buyers
• Re-engage and continue to build the relationship
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

3
Module 2 Summary Notes
Hot Traffic
• Your buyers
Goals of Hot Traffic
• Convert prospects into buyers
• Re-engage and continue to build the relationship
